MINI MINUTES: Consolidated with Case No. 402597 Jurado vs. State of Calif. and Case No. 400701 Arana vs. Cabrera. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or an opposition filed. The court orders cases dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 225. Proceedings reported by: Helen Sorep-Matley. (212)
